name: Caldillo (New Mexican Green Chili Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean beef round or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the meat and sprinkle with salt. Fry until brown in oil.
2. Add potatoes to the browned meat along with onion, garlic, salt, and chili. Add enough water to cover the ingredients.
3. Continue adding water if necessary. The stew will have a soupy consistency.
